final:
module top_module(
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    output reg tap_output
);always @(*) begin
    if (VPWR && !VGND) begin
        tap_output = 0;
    end else if (!VPWR && VGND) begin
        tap_output = 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      tap_output <= 1; // Intentionally set tap_output to high when it should be low
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: tap_output <= 1; // Intentionally set tap_output to high when it should be low
